Save - git push origin main
Load - git pull origin main

The concept and rolemodel for this project is AK-47 assault rifle. Simple, balanced, trouble-free and troubleproof product. We, as equal partners are looking for best solutions and patterns to create an elegant and efficient codebase. We are not looking for overengineering, but we want to have a clean and maintainable codebase. We want to have a good documentation and tests. We want to have a good structure and organization of the codebase. We want to have a good communication and collaboration between us. We want to have fun and learn new things together.

If Funda returns a bot-challenge page, the bot logs it clearly and retries automatically on the next scheduled run — no intervention needed.
